remaining_tasks.name: Phase 2 — Database & Models (SQLite schema, lazy init, seed defaults)

decisions.decision: D-05 (01-03): SSE tests use real in-process uvicorn server on random port
decisions.rationale: httpx.ASGITransport buffers the full ASGI response and cannot drain infinite SSE generators — proven with a reproduction before fixing.

decisions.decision: D-06 (01-03): create_stream_router builds a fresh APIRouter per call
decisions.rationale: Pre-existing shared-state bug — module-level APIRouter accumulated duplicate /prices routes across factory calls. Fixed in commit 704525d.

next_action: Run `/gsd-discuss-phase 2` to begin Phase 2 (Database & Models) with adaptive context gathering, OR `/gsd-plan-phase 2` to skip discussion and go straight to planning.
context_notes: Phase 1 complete and verified (12/12 must-haves). Full backend test suite: 83 passing, ruff clean. APP-01, APP-03, APP-04 all marked complete in REQUIREMENTS.md. Code review found 2 warnings (WR-01 router re-entry latent-risk, WR-02 misleading docstring in test_main.py) and 4 info items — all advisory, none blocking. Next phase is Phase 2 (Database & Models): SQLite schema, lazy init in lifespan, seed default watchlist + users_profile. See .planning/codebase/CONCERNS.md — Phase 2 DB seed must pick single source of truth for ticker list (currently duplicated between seed_prices.py and market_data_demo.py).
